message:
test(snapshot_engine): expand from 37 to 53 tests for SnapshotEngine utilities

Cover agent_type_from_db/severity_from_db known+unknown, is_missing_events_table
detection, compute_state_hash determinism/empty/different counts, epoch_ms range,
generate_session_id uniqueness, SnapshotError display all variants,
shutdown_checkpoint capture+mark+no-session paths, dedup PeriodicFallback/Event.

wa-1u90p.7.1 Batch 13

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
